sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109202" key="u(poste/gasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποστέγ-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποπέτασμα</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:208" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.208</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
